doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_cmp_ui: compare an MPFR value against an unsigned 64-bit integer. Returns -1/0/+1. Throws MPFRError('EDOMAIN') on NaN x; throws MPFRError('EPREC') on n outside uint64. Specialisation of cmp_si with implicit sign=+1 and widened range [0, 2^64-1]. Class 'arithmetic' (50ms budget).
c_signature: int mpfr_cmp_ui(mpfr_srcptr op, unsigned long ui)
divergence_from_c: Same NaN-throw divergence as cmp_si. Out-of-range n (negative or above ULONG_MAX) throws MPFRError('EPREC').
refs: mpfr/src/cmp_ui.c L33–L92 — the C reference body (mpfr_cmp_ui_2exp with f=0).
